publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

licence.p: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

supportDesc.foliation: Foliation in the middle of the upper margin.

binding.decoNote: Two wooden boards covered with stiff leather.
No textile inlays, crudely cut turn-ins cover most of the inner surface of the front board, and entire inner surface of the back board.
Remains of lacings (leather strips) inserted in the leather turn-ins on the front and back boards.

msItem.title: Psalter (non-standard)
Song of Songs
Mazmura Dāwit
Book of Odes
Book of Odes, First Song of Moses () (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT2277salotu)
Book of Odes, Second Song of Moses () (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT2278salota)
Book of Odes, Third Song of Moses () (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT2703salota)
Book of Odes, Song of Hannah () (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT2257salota)
Book of Odes, Prayer of Manasseh () (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT2265salota)
Book of Odes, Song of Jonah () (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT2274salota)
Book of Odes, First Song of the Three Youths in the Furnace () (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT2250salota)
Book of Odes, Second Song of the Three Youths () (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT2271salota)
Book of Odes, Third Song of the Three Youths () (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT1566hababa)
Book of Odes, Song of Habakkuk () (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT2251salota)
Book of Odes, Song of Isaiah () (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT2259salota)
Book of Odes, Song of Our Lady Mary () or Magnificat (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT1827Magnif)
Book of Odes, Song of Zachariah () (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT2275salota)
Book of Odes, Song of Simeon, or Nunc Dimittis () (same as https://betamasaheft.eu/LIT2272salota)
Stichometry of the Psalms
A collection of readings for canonical hours, in part similar to that in BAVet15
msItem.incipit: ጽሎተ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ወአምላክነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ወልደ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አብ፡ እስእለከ፡ ለቅድስት፡ ወላዲተ፡ አምላክ፡ ማርያም፡ ወበጸሎቶሙ፡ ቅዱሳኒከ፡ ረሲየኒ፡ እቅድም፡ ገቢረ፡ ምግባረ፡ ሠናያቲከ፡ ወተሣሀለኒ፡ በከመ፡ ብዝኀ፡ ምሕረፍከ፡ እስመ፡ ናሁ፡ ሌሊት፡ ኀለፈ፡ ኣአተኵተከ፡ እግዚኦ፡ ወእስእለከ፡ ከመ፡ ትረሲየኒ፡ እኩን፡ ዮም፡ ዳኅነ፡ ዘእንበለ፡ ኀጢአት፡ ወኣርትዕ፡ ፍኖትየ፡ ውስተ፡ ገቢረ፡ ትዕዛዛቲከ፡

msItem.title: Wǝddāse Māryām

colophon.note: According to the colophon, the manuscript () was copied in the year of mercy 6936 (= 1428 CE), in a district of ʾAmḥarā called Ḫaqqǝlat. Murad Kamil read the year as 6937 (= 1429 CE) and considered as the scribe Qalemǝnṭos who is mentioned in the colophon (cp. also ). This cannot be excluded but the text of the colophon is not fully clear.
colophon.foreign: በ፷፻፡ በ፱፻ በ፴ወ፮፡ ዓመተ፡ ምሕረት፡ በምድረ፡ ኢቲዮጵያ፡ ኣምሓራ፡ ኀቅለት፡ ተጽሕፈ፡ ዛቲ፡ ዳዊት፡ ወዘሐንከሮስ፡ አነ፡ ኀጥእ፡ ቀሌምንጦስ፡ በስም፡ ቀሲስ፡ እኁሁ፡ ለጴጥሮስ፡ ካህን፡ ዘመላኪይ፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን፡

layout.note: Data from . The number of lines is up to 27 on subsequent folia.
layout.ab: The upper written line is placed below the upper ruled line.

layout.note: All data taken from . The number of written lines is up to 29 and more on some folia.
layout.ab: On many folia, the upper written line is located below the upper ruled line.

layout.note: All data taken from . The number of written lines varies (cp. 43 lines on ).
layout.ab: On many folia, the upper written line is placed below the upper ruled line. The leaf fol. 130 is ruled by means of a different method (no text pricks are visible, the horizontal ruled lines go through the entire outer margin).

seg.desc: Not careful, irregular; by a mediocre scribe. The quality of the handwriting diminishes on and . Possibly more than one scribe was involved in writing (cp. esp. the hand on ).

item.desc: Unclear note, seems to indicated the dimensions of the body of Adam.
Testamentum Adami A few initial lines are missing. Three last lines of the text are written in the bottom margin of the folium.
item.q: ኦወልድየ፡ በቀዳሚት፡ ሰዓተ፡ መዓልት፡ የዓርግ፡ ጸሎቶሙ፡ ለውሉድየ፡ ኀበ፡ እግዚአብሔር። ወበ፪ሰዓት፡ ይከውን፡ ጸሎቶሙ፡ ወስእለቶሙ፡ ለመላእክት፨አርምሞ፡ ለዕለ፡ ኵሎሙ፡ ሰማያን።
item.note: Cues for the rubricator are written in the margins.

desc.title: Kʷǝllomu sarāwita malāʾǝkt nadda ʾǝsat ʾǝmmuntu...

item.q: ኵሎሙ፡ ሰራዊተ፡ መላእክት፡ መንፈሳዊያን፡ ነደ፡ እሳት፡ እሙንቱ፡ ይጸርኁ፡ ወይብሉ፡ ካልእ፡ ለካልዑ፡ ኪሩቤል፡ ይብሉ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ወሱራፌል፡ ይብሉ፡ እኩት፡ ወሩፋኤል፡ ይብሉ፡ ቡሩክ፡

item.desc: A chronological note or commentary on the Virgin Mary and Christ, written in the upper margin in an old crude hand, partly poorly understandable, is marked by a sign looking like tamallas, but its relation to the main text is not clear.
item.q:
እግዚእትነ፡ እሙ፡ ለክርስቶስ፡ ወሐይወት፡
ውስተ፡ ዓለም፡ ፶ወ፩፡ ዓመት፡ እምቅድመ፡ ወሊደታ፡
፲ወ፫ዓመት፡ እስከ፡ ዕርገቱ፡ ዓረት፡ ፵ወ፯ ዓም፡ ወእ
ምድኅረ፡ ዕርጉ፡ ነበረት፡ ፬ዓመት፡ አ፲ወ፭፡ እረፍታ፡ በነሐሴ፡ በሮሜ፡ ጸሎታ፡

item.desc: A note recording the death of the priest Ṗeṭros (the same person as mentioned in SinaiEt006) that took place on 14 Gǝnbot 6952 "year of mercy" (=1444 CE). The note was written by his brother Qalemǝnṭos.
item.q: ወዓእረፈ፡ ቀሲስ፡ ጴጥሮስ፡ አሡሩ፡ ወረቡዑ፡ ለግንቦት፡ እምተሱኡ፡ በሮሜ። ፷፻ወበ፱፻፡ ፶ወ፪፡ ለአብነ፡ ዓዳም፡ ወጸሐፎ፡ ኃጥእ፡ ዝልጉስ፡ በስም፡ መነኮስ፡ ቀሌምንጦስ።
item.note: Cp. No item: SinaiEt006_, could not check for a4.

item.desc: On some folia there is the word ስብሐት፡written in the (upper) margin; on some others a Greek word composed of three letters
On some folia there is the word ስብሐት፡written in the (upper) margin; on some others a Greek word composed of three letters
Probably directives indicating the prayers, poorly readable
Short unclear writing on the inner side of the back board

history.origin: 1428 CE. Ḫaqqǝlat. The date and the production place of Unit 1 are mentioned in Colophon 1. Murad Kamil drew conclusion on the identity of the scribe probably not on the basis of Colophon 1 but of where Qalemǝnṭos (a brother of Peṭros) calls himself the scribe of the note.

msItem.title: Collection of prayers similar in structure to the canonical hours

handNote.desc: Careful but somewhat irregular; by a mediocre scribe. The written lines frequently disregard the ruling. Of the same period as the main , less careful but not much dissimilar from it.

decoNote.desc: Simple and short monochromic ornamental band.

item.desc: The note, written in a crude hand, seems to set up the structure of the service of canonical hours
item.q: ሰዓታት፡ በሮም፡ እምዳዊት። ጸሎት፡ በሌሌሊት፡ እምቅድመ፡ ኵሉ፡ በል፡ ፫ጊዜ፡ ቅዱስ። ወአቡ፡ ዘበሰማያት። ወድኅሬሁ። ፻፳፡ መዝሙር፡ ፫ጊዜ፡ በል፡

item.desc: Possibly a title or indication to the reader (partly trimmed above)

history.origin: Some time after 1428. was written some time after , most probably outside Ethiopia (since the writing support is paper). Unit 2 was unlikely meant as circulation unit.

msItem.title: Prayer
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ ረስየነ፡ እግዚኦ፡ ድልወነ፡ ንክሥት፡ አፉነ፡ ከመ፡ ንሴብሕከ፡ በልብ፡ ንጹሕ፡ ወበልሳን፡ ዘኢያረምም፡

msItem.title: Hymn to Our Lady Mary
msItem.incipit: ኦመሠረት፡ አንቲ፡ ለኵሉ፡ ዓለም። ዘኮንኪ፡ ማኅደር፡ ለዓቢይ፡ ወልዑል፡ አምላክ፨ መሐረኒ፡ ወአጽልሊ፡ ላዕሌየ፡ ጽላሌ፡ ኣልባስኪ፨ ኦእመ፡ አምላክ፡ ጸልይ፡ ለዕለ፡ ሰአሉ፡ ወጸውዑ፡ ቅዱሰ፡ ስመኪ፨ ኦስብሕት፡ ወቡርክት፡ እምኵሎን፡ አንስት፡ እሳለኪ፡ ወኣስተበቍዓኪ፡ መሐርኒ፡ በሠናይ፡ ምግባርኪ፨

collation.note: Unit 3 is composed of quire 17 and quire 18.

layout.note: Data on text area dimensions taken from .

handNote.desc: Careful, but somewhat irregular; by a good scribe.

decoNote.desc: Two simple and short ornamental bands.
Two simple and short ornamental bands.

history.origin: Some time around or possibly before 1428. Unit 3 is possible a fragment of a manuscript. A commissioner or owner, Ṗeṭros (who could be the priest Ṗeṭros brother of Qalemǝnṭos, see above) is mentioned in the supplication formulas (for instance ).

msItem.title: Ḥassāba rәtuʿ
msItem.incipit: ሐሳብ፡ ርቱዕ፡ ዘሐዋርያት፡ እንተ፡ኀበ፡ ይቀርብ፡ እም፡ አቡነ፡ አዳም፡ እስከ፡ ኖኅ፡ ፳፻፪፻፵፪፡ ዓመት። እምኖኅ፡ እስከ፡ ሕንጻ፡ ማኅፈድ፡ ዓመት፡ ፭፻፶፰፡ ዓመት። ወበዘተአምር፡ አበቅቴ፡ እምኀበ፡ ይወፅእ፡ ወትነሥእ፡ እምዓመተ፡ ምሕረት፡ ፰፻፹፡ ወዔሪ፡ በበ፹ወይከውን፲፩፳፡ ወትነሥእ፡

msItem.title: Didǝsqǝlyā, Chapter 38
msItem.incipit: በእንተ፡ ከመ፡ መፍትው፡ ናእርፍ፡ ሰንበታተ፡ ወናጽምእ፡ ቃለ፡ ቅዱሳተ፡ መጻሕፍት፡ ከመ፡ ንግበር፡ ፈቃደ፡ ወንዜክር፡ ሕማማቲሁ፡

layout.note: Data on text area and margins taken from .
Data on text area and margins taken from .

handNote.desc: Careful but somewhat irregular; by a mediocre scribe. Of the same period as the main , less careful but not much dissimilar from it.
Careful but somewhat irregular; by a mediocre scribe.

decoNote.desc: Ornamental band composed of black and red lines above the text columns.

item.desc: An unclear crude note, possibly including a few Greek words transcribed in Greek letters.

list.item: Quotation from Ex. 12:37, written in an old hand. ወወፅዑ፡ ምንምስር፡ ስት፡ ማይት፡ እልፍ፡
An unclear note, possibly incomplete. ዘይሰቲዩ፡ እምኔሁ፡

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

revisionDesc.change: Created record from catalogue description with consultation of digitized microfilm
